prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 16 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.7 kg; Height 179.4 cm; BMI 19.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 117/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.5%; 6 months ago 6.0%; 3 months ago 5.7%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 141mg/dL; 9 months ago 149mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 109mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.1kg; 9 months ago 61.8kg; 6 months ago 62.2kg; 3 months ago 64.9kg; current 63.7kg), Height (12 months ago 179.4cm; 9 months ago 179.4cm; 6 months ago 179.4cm; 3 months ago 179.4cm; current 179.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 19.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 117mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 66mmHg; 9 months ago 67mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 67mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 65U/L; 6 months ago 65U/L; 3 months ago 65U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 86U/L; 9 months ago 77U/L; 6 months ago 79U/L; 3 months ago 81U/L; current 85U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 384mg/g; 9 months ago 366mg/g; 6 months ago 352mg/g; 3 months ago 368mg/g; current 380mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 103mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 129mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 126mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 10.4g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.36 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
